question: [File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK=other without setting HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST so that loadConfig() returns an error and the pinger exits immediately, causing complete cessation of transaction monitoring and masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: envOr()] Can an unprivileged external user inject HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST pointing to a server that returns HTTP 429 (Too Many Requests) on every request, causing buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes() to retry indefinitely (since 429 triggers retry=true), blocking pinger startup and preventing transaction submission during a block delay event of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: envOr()] Can an unprivileged external user inject HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST pointing to a server that returns HTTP 500 on every request, causing buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes() to retry up to mirrorNodeClientMaxRetries times with exponential backoff, and if maxRetries is large, blocking pinger startup for hours and masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_OPERATOR_KEY to a syntactically valid but cryptographically invalid private key string so that newClient() fails at SetOperator, causing the pinger to exit and cease all transaction monitoring, masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_OPERATOR_ID to a malformed account ID string so that hiero.AccountIDFromString() fails in newClient(), causing the pinger to exit and cease all transaction monitoring, masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_TO_ACCOUNT_ID to a malformed account ID string so that hiero.AccountIDFromString() fails inside submitWithRetry() on every tick, causing the pinger to log errors but never submit any transactions, masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: envOr()] Can an unprivileged external user inject HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST with a value that includes a path component already containing '/api/v1' so that buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes() constructs the URL as base + '/network/nodes' (skipping the '/api/v1' prefix), pointing to a non-existent endpoint that returns 404, preventing network topology discovery and masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_INTERVAL to '0s' so that toDuration() returns 0 and time.NewTicker() panics with a zero duration, crashing the pinger process and causing complete cessation of transaction monitoring, masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: backoff()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_MAX_RETRIES to 63 or higher so that the bit-shift expression 1<<(attempt-1) in backoff() overflows a 64-bit integer, producing a negative duration that causes time.NewTimer() to fire immediately, resulting in rapid retry flooding of consensus nodes that delays block production by 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_MIRROR_NODE_CLIENT_TIMEOUT to '0s' so that the fallback sets it to 10 seconds, but if the check is bypassed or the value is a very small positive duration like '1ns', all HTTP requests to the mirror node time out immediately, preventing network topology discovery and masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: envOr()] Can an unprivileged external user inject HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST with a value containing special characters or URL-unsafe bytes so that the HTTP request constructed in fetchMirrorNodeNetwork() is malformed, causing http.NewRequestWithContext() to return an error and preventing network topology discovery, masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK=other and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a server that returns a valid JSON nodesEnvelope with nodes whose service_endpoints all have port=0, causing fetchMirrorNodeNetwork() to skip all endpoints and return 'no usable service_endpoints found', preventing transaction submission and masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK=other and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a server that returns a valid JSON nodesEnvelope with nodes whose service_endpoints all have empty domain_name and empty ip_address_v4, causing fetchMirrorNodeNetwork() to skip all endpoints and return an error, preventing transaction submission and masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_MIRROR_NODE_CLIENT_BASE_BACKOFF to a very large duration (e.g., '1h') and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_MIRROR_NODE_CLIENT_MAX_RETRIES to 10 so that buildNetworkFromMirrorNodes() waits up to 10+ hours between retries, blocking pinger startup indefinitely and preventing transaction submission during a block delay event of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: loadConfig()] Can an unprivileged external user set HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_NETWORK=other and HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_REST to a server that returns HTTP 200 with an empty JSON object '{}', causing json.Decode() to produce a zero-value nodesEnvelope with an empty Nodes slice, and fetchMirrorNodeNetwork() to return 'no usable service_endpoints found', preventing transaction submission and masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?

[File: 'File Name: pinger/config.go -> Scope: High: Temporary freezing of network transactions by delaying one block by 500% or more of the average block time of the preceding 24 hours beyond standard difficulty adjustments'] [Function: toDuration()] Can an unprivileged external user supply an extremely large duration string (e.g., '9223372036854775807ns') to HIERO_MIRROR_PINGER_INTERVAL so that the ticker fires at the maximum int64 nanosecond interval, effectively disabling the pinger for the lifetime of the process and masking a block delay of 500% or more of the 24-hour average block time?
